content: Set up global styles, fonts (Inter + Instrument Serif), noise, custom utilities
Build shared UI primitives (GlowCard, Marquee, Reveal, MagneticButton, Container, SectionLabel)
Build all sections (Nav, Hero w/ animated bg, PoweredBy marquee, Stats, Ecosystem, Problem, Program, Timeline, Testimonials, Qualification, Mentor, Aftermath, FAQ, FinalCTA, Footer)
Patch craco dev-server (v5 incompatibility with react-scripts 5)
Wire into App.js, test compile, screenshot & polish
